playbook.intent: Move the agency from majority project-based revenue to majority retainer/productized recurring revenue. Outcome: at least 50% MRR-style recurring by month 6, founder time spent on delivery cut by 40%, gross margin up by 10pp.
playbook.scope: Move the agency from majority project-based revenue to majority retainer/productized recurring revenue. Outcome: at least 50% MRR-style recurring by month 6, founder time spent on delivery cut by 40%, gross margin up by 10pp.

success-criteria.criterion: All 6 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Audit Today's Mix

tasks.task: Compute revenue split: project vs retainer vs productized
Compute margin and founder-hours per type
Set a 6-month target: ≥50% MRR-style by month 6

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when target is documented and approved by the founder.

stage.name: Pick 2 Recurring Products
stage.intent: Decide what you'll sell on retainer.

tasks.task: Pick 2 with the strongest repeat-buying signal
Define scope, price, and gross-margin floor per offering

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 2 offerings have a written scope/price/margin model.

stage.name: Migrate Existing Book
stage.intent: Convert current project clients to recurring where possible.

tasks.task: Identify 5-8 project clients that fit the new retainer offers
Pitch the retainer to each; sign at least 3
Wind down the project-only engagements that don't fit

stage.decision-gate: Advance when ≥3 retainers are signed and start dates are on calendar.

stage.name: Acquire New Recurring Customers
stage.intent: Build the inbound and outbound motion.

tasks.task: Ship landing pages for each recurring offering with conversion tracking
Run a 30-day outbound campaign to 50 ICP prospects
Convert at least 2 net-new logos onto retainer

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when the recurring funnel is producing ≥1 qualified lead/week.

stage.name: Operational Restructure
stage.intent: Stop running the agency like a project shop.

tasks.task: Cut founder delivery hours by 40% via SOPs and contractor handoffs
Rebuild forecast as MRR + project + productized lines

stage.decision-gate: Advance when founder delivery hours have measurably dropped vs month 1.

stage.name: 6-Month Review

tasks.task: Compute gross-margin delta and founder-hour delta

stage.decision-gate: Required output: written go-forward decision with evidence.
